items.raw_excerpt: The woman says 10 dogs were being walked off-leash in Kununurra when seven attacked her and her dog. She says the owners did nothing to assist.
items.summary_en: A woman in Kununurra says seven dogs attacked her and her dog while 10 dogs were running off-leash. The owners did nothing to help. She is warning other residents about the danger.
items.summary_ko: 쿠누누라의 한 여성이 목줄 없이 풀려 있던 10마리 개 중 7마리가 자신과 반려견을 공격했다고 말했다. 개 주인들은 아무런 도움을 주지 않았다. 그녀는 지역 주민들에게 주의를 당부하고 있다.
items.title_en: Woman attacked by pack of dogs in northern WA
items.title_ko: 호주 북부 쿠누누라, 개 떼 습격으로 여성 부상
items.title_original: Woman attacked by dog pack in WA's far north

items.raw_excerpt: Enchanting waterfalls, quaint streets, and summer charm await in this small town in Ontario.
items.summary_en: Bracebridge in Muskoka, Ontario is a small town known as the waterfall capital with 5 beautiful cascades. It offers a quaint downtown, craft beer, and outdoor activities perfect for a summer getaway.
items.summary_ko: 온타리오 머스코카 지역의 브레이스브리지는 5개의 아름다운 폭포가 있는 '폭포의 수도'로 알려진 작은 마을입니다. 아기자기한 시내와 수제 맥주, 야외 활동을 즐길 수 있어 여름 휴가에 안성맞춤입니다.
items.title_en: This small Ontario town is called 'waterfall capital' with charming streets and cascades
items.title_ko: 온타리오의 작은 마을 브레이스브리지, '폭포의 수도'로 불리는 여름 여행지
items.title_original: This Ontario small town is a 'waterfall capital' with storybook streets and magical cascades - Narcity

items.raw_excerpt: Há curitibanos que comemoram o aniversário da capital diariamente, seja com uma música ou com um blog que fale dela
items.summary_en: Some residents of Curitiba celebrate the city's anniversary daily. They do it with music, a blog, or other small acts of love for their city. For them, every day is a reason to honor their capital.
items.summary_ko: 쿠리치바 주민 중 일부는 매일 도시의 생일을 축하한다. 음악을 연주하거나 블로그를 운영하는 등 작은 방식으로 도시에 대한 사랑을 표현한다. 이들에게는 매일이 수도를 기념하는 날이다.
items.title_en: People in Curitiba celebrate the city's birthday every day
items.title_ko: 쿠리치바 시민들은 매일 도시의 생일을 축하한다
items.title_original: Eles celebram a cidade todos os dias - Gazeta do Povo

items.raw_excerpt: I am a third-year History student with minors in Indigenous Studies and Religious Studies. I focus on material culture in the British Empire, specifically fashion and textile history during the Edwardian period. I have previously done extensive work in community-based history research and heritage as well as being involved with multiple university journals. I am passionate about making history inclusive and accessible- a goal I have been able to work on achieving throughout my internship! This S
items.summary_en: Madeline Siaroff, a third-year History student at McGill University, is interning with the Canadian Federation of Friends of Museums. She focuses on material culture and fashion history from the Edwardian period. Her work aims to make history inclusive and accessible.
items.summary_ko: McGill 대학 역사학과 3학년생 Madeline Siaroff가 캐나다 박물관 친구 협회에서 인턴으로 일하고 있다. 그녀는 에드워드 시대 패션과 직물사를 포함한 물질문화를 연구하며, 역사를 더 포용적이고 접근하기 쉽게 만드는 데 힘쓰고 있다.
items.title_en: Internship Spotlight: Madeline Siaroff at Canadian Federation of Friends of Museums
items.title_ko: 인턴십 스포트라이트: Madeline Siaroff, 캐나다 박물관 친구 협회에서 인턴 중
items.title_original: Internship Spotlight: Madeline Siaroff – Canadian Federation of Friends of Museums (CFFM) - McGill University

items.raw_excerpt: Chennai Pride March unites LGBTQIA+ community and allies to protest the Transgender Persons Amendment Act and advocate for inclusivity.
items.summary_en: The Chennai Pride March brought together the LGBTQIA+ community and their supporters. They protested the Transgender Persons Amendment Act. The march called for greater inclusivity and equal rights.
items.summary_ko: 첸나이 프라이드 행진에 LGBTQIA+ 커뮤니티와 지지자들이 모였다. 참가자들은 트랜스젠더 개정법에 항의하며 포용성과 평등한 권리를 요구했다.
items.title_en: Chennai Pride March protests transgender amendment act
items.title_ko: 첸나이 프라이드 행진, 트랜스젠더 개정법 반대 시위
items.title_original: LGBTQIA+ community raises voice against new amendment Act at Chennai Pride

items.raw_excerpt: Chennai's LGBTQIA+ community celebrates Pride Month with a rainbow flag hoisting, advocating for inclusion and critical rights reforms.
items.summary_en: Chennai's LGBTQIA+ community celebrated Pride Month by raising a rainbow flag. They asked for equal rights and inclusion. The event calls for critical reforms.
items.summary_ko: 첸나이의 LGBTQIA+ 커뮤니티가 프라이드의 달을 맞아 레인보우 깃발을 게양했습니다. 이들은 포용과 평등한 권리를 요구했습니다. 이 행사는 중요한 권리 개혁을 촉구하고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Pride flag hoisted in Chennai amid calls for inclusion and action
items.title_ko: 첸나이에서 프라이드 깃발 게양… 포용과 행동 촉구
items.title_original: Pride flag hoisted in Chennai amid calls for inclusion and action

items.raw_excerpt: The 48-year-old eatery closed its no-frills Jurong flagship last year. Its new digs are at Shangri-La Singapore. Why the huge upgrade?
items.summary_en: Beng Hiang, a 48-year-old Hokkien restaurant, closed its no-frills Jurong outlet last year. It has now reopened at the Shangri-La Singapore hotel. The eatery made a big upgrade to its new location.
items.summary_ko: 지난해 간소한 주롱 매장을 닫았던 벵히앙이 샹그릴라 싱가포르에 새롭게 문을 열었습니다. 48년 역사의 이 식당은 왜 큰 변화를 선택했을까요?
items.title_en: Iconic Hokkien restaurant Beng Hiang reopens at Shangri-La Singapore months after closing Jurong flagship
items.title_ko: 48년 전통 호키엔 레스토랑 '벵히앙', 샹그릴라 싱가포르에 재오픈
items.title_original: Iconic Hokkien restaurant Beng Hiang reopens at Shangri-La Singapore months after closing Jurong flagship

items.raw_excerpt: Regional West Australian courts closed amid a stoush over security services are set to reopen about a month earlier than originally planned.
items.summary_en: Regional courts in Western Australia were closed because of a dispute about security services. The state government has now solved the dispute. Courts will reopen about one month earlier than first planned.
items.summary_ko: 웨스턴오스트레일리아 지역 법원들이 보안 용역 갈등으로 폐쇄됐다가 주 정부가 문제를 해결하면서 예정보다 약 한 달 일찍 다시 문을 열게 됐다.
items.title_en: Regional court shutdown to end early in Western Australia
items.title_original: Court shutdown to end after Department of Justice resolves security dispute

items.raw_excerpt: Kochi's footpaths are largely inaccessible, raising concerns over pedestrian rights and the need for improved infrastructure and accessibility.
items.summary_en: Sidewalks in Kochi, India are mostly blocked or broken. People cannot walk safely. Citizens are asking for better paths.
items.summary_ko: 인도 코치의 보도 대부분이 통행이 어려운 상태로, 보행자 안전이 위협받고 있다. 시민들은 보행권 보호와 인프라 개선을 촉구하고 있다.
items.title_en: Kochi walkways block pedestrians, raising rights concerns
items.title_ko: 인도 코치, 통행 불가한 보도에 보행권 위기
items.title_original: Pedestrian rights in focus as Kochi’s footpaths remain inaccessible

items.raw_excerpt: Two people were taken to hospital after the single vehicle crash on Burwood Drive, Blackmans Bay in Tasmania's south.
items.summary_en: A single-car crash on Burwood Drive in Blackmans Bay, southern Tasmania, sent two people to the hospital. The accident also cut power to about 320 homes in the area.
items.summary_ko: 터스메이니아 남부 블랙먼스베이의 버우드 드라이브에서 승용차 단독 사고가 발생해 2명이 병원으로 이송됐다. 이 사고로 인근 320여 가구의 전기도 함께 끊겼다.
items.title_en: Two hurt, 320 lose power after serious crash in Tasmania
items.title_ko: 터스메이니아 남부 차량 충돌로 2명 부상, 320가구 정전
items.title_original: Two injured, 320 without power after 'serious' crash in Tasmania's south
